specification: Raw UMI counts enter the model with a library-size offset.
Negative-binomial means link counts to state-specific gene programs.
Each cell carries continuous simplex weights rather than a forced hard class.
Study and donor terms absorb cohort- and sample-level count shifts.
Marker sets orient states without replacing likelihood-based inference.
Composition, FPI, transfer, uncertainty, and cross-sectional flow are reported as bounded outputs.
